programme.title: Army of One
programme.desc: Special Forces agent Brenner and her husband stumble upon an illegal drug compound in the woods while hiking. The drug dealers capture them, kill her husband, and leave her for dead. Not only does Brenner escape alive, she is also seething with rage and vows to hunt down all who murdered her husband and take revenge!

programme.title: RUTE:Toughness Redefined
programme.desc: The growing regional competition R U Tough Enough is searching for the toughest person from Southeast Asia. Join the search and meet some of the most mentally and physically strong individuals, leading up to an epic final showdown in Kuala Lumpur for the prize of US$15,000!

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud’s successor as the city’s guard.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Burning Blood
programme.desc: Narcotics squad members—Tai Hua, Lao Mi, Ah Feng, and Ah Tang—are involved in arresting a drug lord. However, a betrayal within the police leads to the deaths of Ah Feng and his superior, while Ah Tang vanishes. As Tai Hua and Lao Mi uncover the truth, they find themselves torn between loyalty and betrayal in their fight against the drug cartel.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Army of One
programme.desc: Special Forces agent Brenner and her husband stumble upon an illegal drug compound in the woods while hiking. The drug dealers capture them, kill her husband, and leave her for dead. programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Prisoner Chi flees away under Master Zhang’s custody, causing the latter to be expelled from his clan. On his way to find Chi, Master Zhang arrives at a place where many people vanish for no reason. He soon discovers that it is Chi who captures them in his training to become a serpent demon. The war between human and demon has just begun!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Cruel War
programme.desc: To combat the greenhouse effect, scientist Yan Xin attempts to plant newly developed super rubber seeds on a remote island, hoping to transform it into a thriving new land. Yan Xin's ex-husband decides to accompany her on this perilous journey. As conflicts arise, they encounter the local drug cartel, and a fatal battle is about to begin.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Triad boss Song seeks to whitewash his image and seize Laika’s mayoral seat amid a regime change. Just as Song believes success is imminent, the dynamics between the three take an unexpected turn….

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Detective Di Skeleton General
programme.desc: A village community is left reeling from the brutality of a series of mysterious killings, leading a renowned detective of the era to investigate in search of the truth.

programme.title: Terminator: Dark Fate
programme.desc: When an advanced Terminator is sent into the past, a cyborg and a seasoned female warrior team up to stop the death of a young woman who is fated to ensure the survival of the human race.

programme.title: A Haunting in Venice
programme.desc: Retired detective Hercule Poirot attends a seance at an opera singer's residence. However, when one of the guests gets murdered, Poirot is forced to put his retirement on hold to solve the case.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Two siblings find an eerie board game after moving into their new house. While playing it, they release a man, who has been trapped in it for 26 years, and dangers from the jungle.

programme.title: Captain America: Civil War
programme.desc: Captain America and Iron Man clash over a law to regulate superhuman activities, causing a rift within the Avengers and leading to an all-out war.

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: Six people from different walks of life participate in an escape room competition to win ten thousand dollars. Things change when they find themselves in horrifying circumstances.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Decades after Caesar's demise, the apes have settled into peaceful colonies while humans degrade into brutes. However, a sudden attack pushes a young chimpanzee to undertake a poignant rescue mission.

programme.title: Con Air
programme.desc: Cameron Poe, a wrongly convicted parolee, travels in a flight to go home. However, trouble knocks on the door when the flight is hijacked by some dangerous criminals.

programme.title: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
programme.desc: Shang-Chi, a martial artist, lives a quiet life after he leaves his father and the shadowy Ten Rings organisation behind. Years later, he is forced to confront his past when the Ten Rings attack him.

StreetDance 2
programme.desc: After an embarrassing defeat, a street dancer, Ash, assembles the best dancers from all across the world for another round against the Invincible crew.

programme.title: Sinister 2
programme.desc: Courtney Collins, a single mother, relocates to a rural home with her twin sons. Later, she discovers it's inhabited by malevolent spirits connected to the sinister entity Bughuul.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Movie
programme.desc: When four lifelong friends receive three tickets from singer Paula Abdul to her concert, they compete in a series of pranks to decide which amongst them will attend the show.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss volunteers to replace her sister in a tournament that ends only when one participant remains. Pitted against contestants who have trained for this all their life, she has little to rely on.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul, the young scion of House Atreides faces troubling visions of the future. Meanwhile, his family fights to gain control over Arrakis, the only source of the valuable spice melange.

programme.title: Rocky
programme.desc: An unknown boxer gets a chance to fight the world heavyweight champion and he blindly jumps into the ring in a bid to earn respect and glory.

programme.title: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A soldier in an alien war repeats the same day each time he dies, teaming up with a skilled warrior to find and destroy the enemy's power source and break the time loop.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: Ostracized by everyone for being the child of a cruel overlord, a teen assembles his fellow ninjas to fight off his father.

programme.title: Rush Hour 2
programme.desc: Detective James Carter and Chief Inspector Lee return to action after a bomb explosion at the US Embassy in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Running Wild with Bear Grylls - Season 4
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a trek through the mountains of New England, which includes crossing a raging river and a climb to a towering railroad bridge; Bear considers a porcupine carcass for dinner.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: Sara's Australia Unveiled
programme.desc: Sara goes to Yawuru conservation park to try and catch some mud crabs with cultural guide Bart, who is originally from Broome.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Catch poisonous Newt and massive Cottonmouth with Coyote Peterson.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Can Coyote discover the Monster shrimp in the river?

programme.title: Wardens Case Files
programme.desc: An elusive smuggler is found with an exotic tusk. Then a story of how a dog and two amused kids leads to a bust.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files
programme.desc: Misplaced bravado leads one badge to take down another. Then a whale of a tale, about a sea creature, far from home.

programme.title: Yukon for Sale
programme.desc: Don and Kelly are looking for a small home for themselves and a large piece of land for their ten Canadian Eskimo dogs.

programme.title: Yukon for Sale
programme.desc: Single Sarah is a Yukon newbie and has never bought a house before, so she enlists her skeptical friend, Sarah, to help her out.

programme.title: Down to Earth with Zac Efron - Season 2
programme.desc: From Sydney to the Greater Blue Mountains, Zac and Darin meet with leading eco-warriors to learn about protected lands and habitat conservation.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: After Bangladesh, Rooftop and Catfish explore the country of Japan next. They test out their careers as sumo wrestlers and ninjas (though they learn they should probably stick to BMX), eat pufferfish, a delicacy outlawed everywhere else in Asia, and try to handle Japan's bondage culture from a dominatrix. They join in on a game of Bo Taoshi, and get saline injections to fit in with Japan's nightli

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish explore Indonesia in a fiery way. The duo test out their manhoods with leech therapy, wall jumping, participating in a traditional whip dance, and trying the ancient martial art of debus. They then slow down for a moment to stop and smell the Indonesian fruit durian and cut one out of a tree to taste test. Finally their Indonesian adventure ends with a game of flaming soccer in

programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-func

programme.title: Andy and Ben Eat Australia - Season 3
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah's Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paper

programme.title: Save this Rhino
programme.desc: Kevin Pietersen (KP) invites Matt Wright to South Africa, to visit the Kruger National Park area, and show him the state of play and understand the world of poaching. Aside from his success in cricket, KP has also been a fierce and passionate member of the global choir singing to save the rhino. It's Matt's first time in South Africa, but it's not the first time he's had to face the problem of end

programme.title: Save this Rhino
programme.desc: Although the situation is bleak, there is hope.Back at an undisclosed reserve, Matt, KP and Graeme Smith meet another kind of team saving rhinos. From perimeter and ground-based technologies to revolutionary communication and data analysing systems, they are diving into what could be the future of wildlife conservation. programme.desc: Nolan Hayes faces challenges to keep Abigail, his newborn daughter who is on a ventilator, alive when Hurricane Katrina impacts the functionality and electricity of the hospital.

programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates a reported surge of demonic activity in America that is overwhelming the Catholic Church; Paul follows leads from Gary, Ind., to Mineral Wells, Texas, where he steps outside his comfort zone and into an alleged portal to hell.

programme.desc: Although alien abduction claims are often dismissed as hoaxes or delusions, there are landmark cases that scholars struggle to refute; Calvin Parker retells his harrowing experience of being abducted near the Pascagoula River in Mississippi.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Evidence suggests contact with interstellar travelers in the distant past may have influenced humankind and many of its sacred sites.

programme.desc: Aniq risau jika kegiatan haramnya bakal dibongkar oleh Kahar. Ziyan terpandang Qistina dan mula mengekorinya. Luqman merasa gelisah apabila melihat Qistina berbual mesra dengan Ziyan.

programme.title: Persepsi
programme.desc: Nadia akhirnya berhadapan dengan isu perkahwinan dia. Jessie dan Azri berkeputusan mencari penyelesaian kepada isu dari masa silam mereka. Akhirnya Daya mendapat jawapan yang tak disangka tersembunyi.

programme.title: Di Balik Idola
programme.desc: Program bual bicara menggunakan konsep terbuka membariskan penyanyi dan pelakon. Berkongsi pengalaman dan cerita yang belum pernah diketahui oleh masyarakat.

programme.title: Konsert Yang Paling Padu
programme.desc: Program nyanyian dan bual bicara yang menghimpunkan 2 penyanyi yang dikenali ramai. Mereka bukan sahaja mempunyai persamaan dari segi karier tapi juga profil peribadi.

programme.title: The Lucky Bini Show
programme.desc: Pelbagai permainan yang menyeronokkan & menarik yang dibuat untuk pasangan selebriti yang sudah berkahwin, tindakan dan jawapan mereka yang tidak dapat diramalkan melalui kuiz dan permainan fizikal.

programme.title: Solo Yolo : Checklist
programme.desc: Mampukah selebriti-selebriti ini melakukan cabaran yang diberikan kepada mereka mengikut bajet yang telah ditetapkan.

programme.title: Rasa Nostalgia Ramadan 3
programme.desc: Menyajikan hidangan istimewa dari nenek moyang mereka dan membincangkan makanan nostalgia ketika menjelang Ramadan

programme.title: Scammer Geng Marhaban
programme.desc: Rancangan yang mengupas bagaimana 2 beradik lelaki yang tak begitu rapat bercinta dengan gadis yang sama menipu wang ibu mereka.

programme.title: Mat Dan Kaki Jalan
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah travelog santai tentang perjalanan dan percutian seorang lelaki Inggeris Daniel Tayler atau dikenali sebagai Mat Dan berasal dari Cheltenham England ke Malaysia.

programme.title: My Buskers
programme.desc: Rancangan yang mempersembahkan selebriti-selebriti tempatan menyanyi bersama-sama dengan buskers-buskers tempatan menyanyikan lagu-lagu popular.

programme.title: Aunty Reporting For Duty
programme.desc: Saksikan geng mak-mak melakukan cabaran yang menguji fizikal dan minda mereka. Mampukah geng mak-mak menyelesaikan misi yang diberi?

programme.title: Musnahkan Pelamin Anganku
programme.desc: Mikael yang merupakan seorang wedding planner menerima tawaran besar untuk menjayakan sebuah majlis perkahwinan pelanggannya. Namun majlis perkahwinan tersebut merupakan majlis bekas isterinya.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2
programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
programme.desc: Aniq risau jika kegiatan haramnya bakal dibongkar oleh Kahar. Ziyan terpandang Qistina dan mula mengekorinya. Luqman merasa gelisah apabila melihat Qistina berbual mesra dengan Ziyan.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Kampung Pom Pom Letops
programme.desc: Elly Mazlein atau dikenali sebagai Kak Lina Pom Pom menjemput tetamu jemputan yang terdiri daripada duda dan jejaka idaman Malaya.

programme.title: 3 Campur 2
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Nikah, Cerai, Rujuk
programme.desc: Hanna kecil hati dengan keluarga suaminya apabila ibu mertuanya sering sahaja mencari salahnya dan Adam pula tidak cuba untuk mempertahankan dia.

programme.title: Halal Maps
programme.desc: Menampilkan sajian kulinari seluruh dunia, Halal Maps menemui penduduk tempatan yang berkongsi hidangan Halal kegemaran di bandar mereka, di mana mendapatkannya dan bagaimana menuju ke sana.

programme.title: Dee The Series
programme.desc: Dee bersama adik dan ibunya Amy, memulakan hidup baru di KL apabila Amy mendapat kerja baru di sebuah kolej swasta. Bermulalah satu dunia baru untuk Dee yang penuh dengan muzik, gelak ketawa dan air mata.

programme.title: SULTAN ROTI MAH BEBAS
programme.desc: Rory (Qausar Harta) is a manager at "Poetra Bakery." Rory is forced to work and love Tania because he is keeping a promise made by his friend. By chance, Rory meets Zahra (Masayu Clara), a beautiful girl who sells bread door-to-door. Their encounter begins with an argument, but eventually Rory becomes interested in Zahra's delicious bread. Rory wants to learn from Zahra how to make delicious bread

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Masa Mantan Koki Bisa Bikin Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Siska (Ersya Aurelia) was asked by Daniel to be able to cook, because Daniel's family has a restaurant business and his mother gave a condition that Daniel's wife must be good at cooking. Siska finally asks Bobby (Kevin Hillers), her ex who is a chef and has a culinary business, for help.

programme.title: Jonsson Workwear Open
programme.desc: The Challenge Series features the key events on the European Challenge Tour. The content provides close up profiles with the future stars, life-style features, as well as all the exciting final day action from the event.

programme.title: Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard Round 1
programme.desc: The Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard is one of the premier-event jewels on the PGA Tour. It is played at the Bay Hill Club and Lodge, a private golf resort owned since 1974 by Arnold Palmer in Bay Hill, a suburb southwest of Orlando, Florida. The winner receives a red cardigan sweater in memory of Arnold Palmer, a tradition that began with the 2017 tournament after Palmer's death
